nativePolicy: Group mode preserves each child action as a native tab stop.
Toolbar mode implements Home, End, orientation arrows, disabled skipping, and RTL spatial arrows.

Toolbar items are direct native or Mergora actions with exactly one focusable root; custom router/action components opt in with markButtonGroupAction only when they forward toolbar props to one native action root.
Separators remain unmanaged and unsupported action subtrees are inert with a development diagnostic.
No button or link semantics are rewritten by the group.
